Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jan-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Allister Capati 415-999-2121 Defendant in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Hearing On Claim Of Exemption of Allister F. Capati aka Allister Capati.

Denied. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
